name: Tomato Salad
directions: In your serving bowl, put the cucumbers and salt and toss.
Set it to the side for 10 minutes.
Cucumbers will"sweat".
DO NOT TOSS THE WATER!
This is part of your salad dressing.
Add the tomatoes, scallions and olive oil and toss.
Put it in the fridge until you are ready to eat.
The longer it sits, the better it tastes.

similar.name: Red Pepper and Cucumber Raw Salad

name: Sweet and Sour Cucumber Salad
directions: Peel the cucumber and halve lengthwise; scrape out the seeds and cut into thick chunks.
Place chunks into a bowl and toss with the salt.
Allow to rest for 30 minutes.
Mix together the sugar, rice vinegar, chilli oil, and sesame oil in a small dish.
Add mixture to cucumers, and stir until cucmbers are evenly coated.
Serve chilled.

similar.name: Cucumber Vegetable Salad With Cilantro & Red Onion

name: Energy Salad
directions: Combine salad ingredients and toss.
To make dressing prick garlic with fork, whip together other ingredients with the garlic on the fork.
Throw garlic away and pour 1/4 to 1/2 cup dressing on the salad.
Store the rest.

name: Tidbit Raw Vegetable Salad With Toasted Seeds
directions: Slice, dice, grate and mince all vegetables until they are all in tiny bite size pieces, and toss together in a large bowl.
Heat the olive oil in a large pan.
Season the pumpkin, sunflower and seasame seeds with the seasoned salt.
pan fry the seeds in olive oil and cool on a paper towel.
Toss the seeds with the salad.
serve with your favorite dressing.

similar.name: Cucumber Vegetable Salad With Cilantro & Red Onion

name: Vegetable Salad
directions: Wash and then cut all the veggies into small diced pieces and place in large container with lid.
Shake lemon pepper (I use a lot, and I do mean a lot), seasoning salt, small amount of either garlic salt or garlic powder and veggie seasoning.
Do not drain the small amount of water out from washing your veggies, shake vigorously to mix all spices in and then place lid on and let sit in fridge overnight.
The next day it is ready, and has sat in it's own juices all night, so the flavor is perfect and you don't need to add anything further.
Hope you all like it.

name: Broccoli Salad
directions: Mix broccoli, raisins and pepper.
Add onions, walnuts, and seeds.
Add dressing, if desired, just before serving.

name: Old Fashion Cucumber Salad
directions: Place sliced cucumbers in bowl;sprinkle every few layers with salt.
Cover cucumbers with a plate and weight them down with a heavy can.
Let stand at room temperature for 2 hours.
Drain cucumbers and press out remaining liquid.
Stir together vinegar and sugar; pour over slices.
Cover and refrigerate at least 4 hours.

similar.name: Red Pepper and Cucumber Raw Salad

name: Yummy Cucumber and Tomato Salad
directions: Peel, seed and cut the cucumbers into medium sized pieces.
Add cucumbers and tomatoes into a large bowl.
In a measuring cup, add lemon juice, apple cider vinegar, flax seed oil, Dijon mustard, garlic and dill. Whisk until throughly mixed.
Add vinaigrette to bowl and toss until cucumbers and tomatoes are throughly coated.

name: Matt's Salad
directions: Use organic ingredients if possible.
Lightly steam the brocolli.
Chop peppers into 1/2 inch pieces, slice spring onions, cut cucumber into 2 inch pieces, slice roasted red peppers.
Mix all ingredients in a salad bowl, except houmous.
Serve with houmous on the side.

similar.name: Cucumber Vegetable Salad With Cilantro & Red Onion
Tidbit Raw Vegetable Salad With Toasted Seeds

name: Avocado,  Artichoke & Grape Salad
directions: Arrange lettuce on salad plate.
Arrange remaining ingredients on top of lettuce.
Drizzle with dressing.
NOTE: This salad would be lovely with edible flowers too.

name: Cucumber Vegetable Salad With Cilantro & Red Onion
directions: Toss cucumber slices with salt in a colander; let stand in the sink or over a bowl until juice has drained, 30-45 minutes.
Pat cucumbers dry with paper towels and turn into a large bowl.
Add remaining vegetables, cilantro, and oil; toss to coat.
Add vinegar and pepper; toss again.
(This salad can be covered and refrigerated several hours.).

similar.name: Tidbit Raw Vegetable Salad With Toasted Seeds

name: Red Pepper and Cucumber Raw Salad
directions: Wash the veggies well.
Slice julienne style.

name: Gourmet Vegetable Salad
directions: combine all ingredients except for spinach and toss.
arrange spinach on 6 plates and top with salad mixture.

name: 7:30 Salad
directions: Toss the romaine hearts and spinach leaves together and arrange in a shallow and wide salad bowl or on a platter.
Place the hearts of palm across the greens in two rows. Arrange the cucumber slices in four mounds on the greens.
Grate the carrot on top of the salad. Place the tomatoes on top in two rows followed by the red onion and green peas.
Finally, top the salad with the capers.
Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.

name: Pickled Cucumber Salad
directions: Slice the cucumbers in half lengthwise, then slice into 1/8" slices on the bias. Add 3 tsp sugar and 3 tsp salt, mix well, and let stand 30 minutes.
Combine 1/4 cup sugar and vinegar in a small saucepan. Heat until sugar dissolves, then simmer until reduced to 1/4 cup, about 2 minutes. Set aside to cool.

Squeeze the excess liquid out of the cucumbers and put into a bowl. Add the slightly cooled syrup, and remaining ingredients except Szechwan pepper and salt. Transfer to a serving dish and sprinkle with Szechwan pepper and salt. Serve the same day.

similar.name: Cucumber Vegetable Salad With Cilantro & Red Onion

name: Spicy Korean Cucumber Salad
directions: Wash and slice cucumber into 1/4 - 1/8" pieces. Discard ends.
Spread cucumber slices onto cutting board. Sprinkle with salt and let sit for at least 15 minutes. You should see water start to form on them.
Meanwhile, mix all other ingredients well in a 1.5 Quart mixing bowl. (Use 1/2 cup Rice Vinegar for small to medium size cucumber, 3/4 for larger one).
Press cucumber slices with paper towel or cheesecloth to remove water.
Put cucumbers in bowl and stir so they become coated.
Let marinate at least 1 hour before serving. Cucumbers may start to become a bit limp, but do not let them get soggy due to the vinegar.
To store, place cucumbers in a plastic container with only a little liquid, and leave in the refrigerator.
This recipe serves about 4 for banchan (side dish). Cooking time is marinating time. Add or subtract ingredients to taste. Try green onion or more garlic.

similar.name: Cucumber Vegetable Salad With Cilantro & Red Onion

name: Cucumber Salad
directions: Chop cucumbers, tomato and onion into bite sizes.
Toss salad in a bowl with entire bottle of dressing.
S&P to taste.
Let sit covered overnight in refrigerator.

similar.name: Red Pepper and Cucumber Raw Salad

name: Cucumber Tomato Salad
directions: Peel the cucumber.  Dice into 1/4 inch cubes.  Add to bowl.
Slice the tomato and cut into 1/4 inch cubes.  Add to bowl.
Slice the green onions thinly.  Add to bowl.
Grind salt & pepper onto salad.
Add a bit of Italian dressing.
Toss to coat salad well.

name: Super Salad
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large salad bowl.
Toss and serve.

name: Cambodian Cucumber Salad
directions: Slice cucumbers lengthwise. Sprinkle salt on cut sides, then place cut-side down on paper towels to drain. After 30 minutes, pat dry.
Slice cucumbers into 1/2 inch pieces. Place in a large bowl. In a small bowl, combine the remaining ingredients. Sprinkle on cucumbers and toss to coat. Let sit for 1 hour before serving.

similar.name: Cucumber Vegetable Salad With Cilantro & Red Onion
